'#10d090' : '#f04060'; var secBg = secureAll ? 'rgba(16,208,144,0.10)' : 'rgba(240,64,96,0.10)'; var secBorder = secureAll ? 'rgba(16,208,144,0.30)' : 'rgba(240,64,96,0.30)'; var secLabel = secureAll ? 'All Secure' : (allLocked ? 'Garage Open' : 'Check Locks'); var litColor = activeLights > 0 ? '#00d4f0' : '#4a5570'; var litBg = activeLights > 0 ? 'rgba(0,212,240,0.10)' : 'rgba(74,85,112,0.10)'; var litBorder = activeLights > 0 ? 'rgba(0,212,240,0.25)' : 'rgba(74,85,112,0.15)'; return '
' + secLabel + '' + activeLights + ' Lights On' + temp + '°F

card_mod.style: ha-card { min-height: 18vh; }

ha-card { background: rgba(7,9,16,0.95) !important; border: none !important; border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06) !important; border-radius: 0 !important; box-shadow: none !important; position: fixed !important; bottom: 0 !important; left: 0 !important; right: 0 !important; width: 100% !important; z-index: 1000 !important; }

ha-card { position: relative; } ha-card::after { content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: 6px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); width: 28px; height: 3px; background: #00d4f0; border-radius: 3px; }
